# Simple test to verify mcp-shadow functionality

# Use cat as both primary and shadow servers - they just echo what they receive
exec sh -c 'echo "{\"jsonrpc\":\"2.0\",\"method\":\"test\",\"id\":1}" | mcp-shadow -primary "cat" -shadow "cat" -o output.mcp -q'

# Small delay to ensure processing
exec sleep 0.2

# Check that the trace file was created
exec test -f output.mcp
! stderr .
